title: On the Definition of Robustness and Resilience of AI Agents for Real-time Congestion Management
description:
Robustness
refers to a system’s ability to maintain performance under natural or
adversarial perturbations, either locally (sample-specific) or globally
(deterministic guarantees)[2].

title: A Collaborative, Human-Centred Taxonomy of AI, Algorithmic, and Automation Harms
description:
Resilience, by contrast, is the ability of an AI
system to prepare for, adapt to, and recover rapidly from perturbations or
unexpected changes[3], emphasizing recovery.
